data.title: Guming Holdings Profit More Than Doubles as Revenue Surges in 2025
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Guming Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1364) ) has issued an update.

Guming Holdings Limited reported strong full-year results for 2025, with revenue climbing 46.9% to RMB 12.9 billion and gross profit jumping 58.6% to RMB 4.26 billion, supported by higher other income and controlled operating expenses. Net profit more than doubled to RMB 3.12 billion, while basic earnings per share rose 88.7% to RMB 1.34, reflecting improved operating leverage, non-IFRS adjusted core profit growth of 77.8%, and favorable fair value changes.

The board recommended a final dividend of HK$0.50 per share for 2025, signaling confidence in the company’s cash generation and balance sheet strength. The sharp rise in profitability and dividend proposal underscore the group’s strengthened financial position and may enhance its appeal to income-focused investors, reinforcing its competitive standing in a still-growing consumer market.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1364) stock is a Buy with a HK$32.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Guming Holdings Ltd. stock, see the HK:1364 Stock Forecast page.

More about Guming Holdings Ltd.

Guming Holdings Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong, operating in the consumer sector with a focus on branded products sold across mainland China. The group generates revenue primarily from product sales and related services, positioning itself as a fast-growing player in its segment with an expanding customer base and store network.

Average Trading Volume: 5,550,683

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$67.83B

data.title: Ironveld to Publish Delayed FY25 Accounts and Interim Results by End of March
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ironveld ( (GB:IRON) ) has provided an update.

Ironveld PLC has announced that final sign-off from its U.K. auditors on the company’s audited accounts for the year ended 30 June 2025 is expected imminently, clearing the way for publication before the end of March. The company’s interim results for the six months to 31 December 2025 will be released on the same date, aiming to bring its financial reporting fully up to date and provide stakeholders with a more complete and timely view of recent trading.

The coordinated release of full-year and interim figures is set to reduce uncertainty around Ironveld’s financial position and may help restore confidence among investors following the delay flagged earlier in March. Aligning these disclosures could also streamline the company’s reporting cycle and improve transparency for the market as it assesses Ironveld’s operational momentum and capital needs going into the remainder of 2026.

Spark’s Take on IRON Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IRON is a Neutral.

The overall stock score reflects significant financial performance challenges, notably in profitability and cash flow management, which are critical to address for long-term stability. Technical analysis suggests bearish momentum, adding pressure on the stock. However, positive corporate events, such as successful fundraising and operational milestones, provide a counterbalance, indicating potential for improved future performance.

To see Spark’s full report on IRON stock, click here.

More about Ironveld

Ironveld PLC is a U.K.-listed company operating in the mining and materials sector, focused on the production and processing of iron-related products. It serves industrial customers that rely on timely financial and operational disclosure to assess the company’s performance and prospects within its niche commodities market.

data.title: Kanzhun Steps Up Buybacks and Issues New Shares Under Option Plan in March 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kanzhun Ltd Sponsored ( (BZ) ) has provided an update.

On March 25, 2026, Kanzhun Limited filed a Form 6-K reporting changes in its share capital, including the issuance of 5,000 new Class A ordinary shares on March 24, 2026 upon the exercise of share options by a non-director participant at an issue price of US$3.0807 per share. As of March 24, 2026, this brought the company’s total issued Class A shares to 837,535,825, while 2,591,278 shares remained reserved with the depositary for future ADS issuances under its share incentive plans.

The filing also detailed an active share repurchase program, with a total of 2,227,420 shares bought back under a June 27, 2025 mandate, including 733,918 shares on March 20, 2026, 744,950 shares on March 23, 2026, and 748,552 shares on March 24, 2026 on the Nasdaq Global Select Market at prices around US$6.68–6.80 per share, all designated for cancellation. These moves signal ongoing capital management efforts that may support earnings per share and shareholder value, while the company remains subject to a moratorium on new share issuance or treasury share sales until April 23, 2026 following the repurchases.

The most recent analyst rating on (BZ) stock is a Buy with a $19.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kanzhun Ltd Sponsored stock, see the BZ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BZ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BZ is a Outperform.

Kanzhun Ltd’s strong financial performance and positive earnings call sentiment are the primary drivers of its high score. The company’s robust revenue and profit growth, coupled with successful AI integration, position it well for future growth. However, the technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, and the valuation is moderate, which slightly tempers the overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on BZ stock, click here.

More about Kanzhun Ltd Sponsored

Kanzhun Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and headquartered in Beijing, operates as a foreign private issuer with weighted voting rights and Class A ordinary shares listed in Hong Kong and on the Nasdaq Global Select Market. The company is part of the technology and internet sector, focusing on employment and recruitment services in China through its online platforms, and uses American depositary shares (ADSs) to facilitate international investor access.

Average Trading Volume: 3,903,339

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.48B

data.title: Amex Wins Ontario Drill Permit and Launches 15,000 m Perron West Program
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Amex Exploration ( (TSE:AMX) ) has issued an announcement.

Amex Exploration has secured an Ontario drill permit and outlined a 15,000-metre inaugural drill program at its 100%-owned Perron West project, marking its first major campaign on the Ontario side of the Normétal-Burntbush greenstone belt that hosts its Perron gold resource in Quebec. The initial program will focus on targets developed from inherited geophysical and soil databases and recent groundwork, with priority zones aimed at defining the extension of key structures such as the Normétal Fault.

In parallel, Amex is launching a broader regional program over recently acquired Perron West claims that lack historical work but lie on the same fertile belt, including a 3,101 line-kilometre VTEM Plus geophysical survey, prospecting, and extensive soil sampling. Management views the limited past exploration and the known relationship between gold and VMS mineralization as a significant opportunity to expand discoveries, potentially enhancing the company’s resource base and strategic foothold in this emerging Ontario-Quebec gold-VMS camp.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AMX) stock is a Buy with a C$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Amex Exploration stock, see the TSE:AMX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AMX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AMX is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue, widening losses, and negative free cash flow) partly offset by a strong debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are a positive contributor due to a strong uptrend, though momentum looks overbought. Valuation is constrained by ongoing losses and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on AMX stock, click here.

More about Amex Exploration

Amex Exploration Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on gold and volcanogenic massive sulphide (VMS) discoveries in the Normétal-Burntbush greenstone belt spanning Quebec and Ontario. The company’s flagship Perron project in Quebec hosts a 2.3-million-ounce gold resource, and Amex now controls roughly 70 km of strike length across an underexplored, highly prospective belt for additional gold and VMS mineralization.

Average Trading Volume: 190,706

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$446.2M

Find detailed analytics on AMX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Siav Corrects Key Deadlines for Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Siav S.p.A. ( (IT:SIAV) ).

Siav has issued a correction to the notice convening its upcoming extraordinary shareholders’ meeting, clarifying several key procedural dates for investors. The company now confirms that the record date determining voting entitlement is 25 March 2026, and not 26 March, and that intermediary communications must reach the company by 31 March 2026 instead of 1 April.

The group also adjusts the deadlines for granting proxies and submitting shareholders’ questions, bringing each forward by one day to align with regulatory requirements and the correct trading‑day count. Participation remains possible only via the designated representative, meaning the revised timetable is operationally important for shareholders seeking to exercise voting rights and engage with the meeting agenda.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SIAV) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Siav S.p.A. stock, see the IT:SIAV Stock Forecast page.

More about Siav S.p.A.

Siav S.p.A. Società Benefit is an Italian leader in document management and business process outsourcing, headquartered in Rubano and listed on Euronext Growth Milan. Founded in 1989, it serves over 4,000 public and private clients mainly in Italy, offering proprietary document management software suites, vertical sector solutions and outsourcing services such as dematerialisation and B2B e‑invoicing. The group also operates in Switzerland and Romania and reported 2024 consolidated revenues of €33.3 million and EBITDA of €6.3 million.

Average Trading Volume: 27,400

data.title: Generac Restructures Reporting Into Residential and C&I Segments
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Generac Holdings ( (GNRC) ) has provided an update.

On March 20, 2026, Generac approved incremental performance-based equity awards for executives Norm Taffe and Erik Wilde, with target values of $1 million and $2 million, respectively, vesting over two to three years and tied to business-specific performance metrics. The awards are designed to more closely link senior leadership compensation with the company’s Generac Home and Domestic C&I growth initiatives.

On March 25, 2026, Generac announced a reorganization of its reporting structure, shifting from Domestic and International to Residential and Commercial & Industrial segments effective March 31, 2026. The change aligns reporting with how management now runs the business, emphasizes a unified residential energy and backup power strategy, consolidates global C&I operations, leaves historical consolidated results unchanged, and will be reflected in financial reporting from the first quarter of fiscal 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (GNRC) stock is a Buy with a $224.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Generac Holdings stock, see the GNRC Stock Forecast page.

Technicals show a strong uptrend but look overextended, while valuation is a notable headwind due to the high P/E and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on GNRC stock, click here.

Generac Holdings Inc. is a manufacturer of backup power systems, energy technology solutions and outdoor power equipment, serving residential, commercial and industrial customers. The company focuses on emergency backup generators, mobile power and lighting products, battery energy storage systems and related services across U.S. and international markets.

data.title: Silver One to Showcase Nevada and Arizona Silver Advances at April Investor Webinar
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Silver One Resources ( (TSE:SVE) ) is now available.

Silver One Resources will present an online webcast at the John Tumazos Very Independent Research virtual conference on April 1, 2026, where President and CEO Greg Crowe will update investors on ongoing metallurgical work and drilling at the past-producing Candelaria silver mine in Nevada. The company is testing non-cyanide leaching technologies to upgrade heap leach resources and advance toward a pre-feasibility study target, signalling progress toward potential near-term production and de-risking of the project for stakeholders.

The presentation will also cover continued exploration at the Phoenix Silver project in Arizona, where Silver One is evaluating both very high-grade silver vein potential and a possible porphyry copper-silver system adjacent to major producers such as Freeport McMoRan and BHP. By highlighting its work within one of the most prolific U.S. porphyry copper-silver belts, the company is underscoring its strategic positioning in a tier-one mining jurisdiction and aiming to attract broader investor interest in its exploration pipeline.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SVE) stock is a Sell with a C$0.48 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Silver One Resources stock, see the TSE:SVE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SVE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SVE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (pre-revenue with ongoing losses and cash burn) and bearish technical signals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). A low-debt balance sheet is a mitigating positive, but valuation support is limited given the negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SVE stock, click here.

More about Silver One Resources

Silver One Resources is a Canadian-listed exploration and development company focused on advancing high-quality silver projects in the United States, primarily in Nevada and Arizona. Its flagship asset is the past-producing Candelaria silver mine in Nevada, where it is evaluating the potential reprocessing of historic heap leach pads and pursuing additional high-grade mineralization along strike and at depth. The company also holds the Cherokee project in Nevada, hosting multiple silver-copper-gold vein systems, and the high-grade Phoenix Silver project in Arizona’s prolific “Arizona Silver Belt.”

Average Trading Volume: 816,167

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$179.9M

data.title: Toogood Gold Outlines 8.5 km High-Grade Trend at Newfoundland Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Toogood Gold Corp. ( (TSE:TGC) ) is now available.

Toogood Gold Corp. reported final Phase 2 surface exploration results from its Toogood Gold Project in Newfoundland, confirming high-grade gold samples up to 76.89 g/t along an 8.5-kilometre Shoreline trend and additional significant grades at the Chimo, Vic, and Hank targets. The program, which collected more than 650 rock and soil samples, has outlined several kilometre-scale gold corridors and materially improved the geological model, highlighting a structurally controlled system with strong alignment between mineralization, geochemical anomalies, and major faults.

The company has now defined multiple high-priority, structurally coherent drill target corridors in the NE Block, including the Burnt Arm, Western, and Eastern trends, and plans to advance these toward initial drill testing in 2026. Planned work will focus on infill and regional soil sampling, detailed structural mapping, and systematic drill-target generation, potentially transforming surface anomalies into scalable drill targets and strengthening Toogood Gold’s position in an emerging Newfoundland gold district.

More about Toogood Gold Corp.

Toogood Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on gold, with its flagship 100%-owned Toogood Gold Project located on New World Island in Newfoundland. The company is advancing early-stage, high-grade, structurally controlled gold targets across multiple kilometre-scale trends, positioning itself within a district-scale exploration play in Atlantic Canada.

Average Trading Volume: 271,635

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Learn more about TGC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zengame Technology Announces HKD 0.2 Final Dividend for 2025
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zengame Technology Holding Ltd. ( (HK:2660) ) has provided an announcement.

Zengame Technology Holding Limited has proposed a final ordinary cash dividend of HKD 0.2 per share for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, underscoring its continued focus on shareholder returns and cash distribution. The payout, subject to shareholder approval on 22 May 2026, will be based on a record date of 3 June 2026 and is scheduled for payment on 25 June 2026, providing income visibility for investors and signaling management’s confidence in the company’s financial performance.

The shares will trade ex-dividend on 28 May 2026, with the share register closing from 1 June to 3 June 2026 to determine dividend entitlements. The announcement, which specifies no applicable withholding tax and no impact from warrants or convertible securities, offers clarity on key dates and mechanics of the distribution, helping institutional and retail shareholders plan their portfolio and cash-flow decisions around the dividend event.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2660) stock is a Buy with a HK$3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zengame Technology Holding Ltd. stock, see the HK:2660 Stock Forecast page.

More about Zengame Technology Holding Ltd.

Zengame Technology Holding Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company in the technology and gaming sector. It develops and operates mobile and online games, targeting mass-market players in Greater China and other key Asian markets, and generates revenue primarily through in-game purchases and associated digital services.
